ArcForge Studio
CollectionsProcessData SystemAdminInquiry

Hand-painted fantasy sculpture studio

Collector-grade fantasy sculptures shaped by story, paint, and detail.

ArcForge presents original character sculptures, battle dioramas, and custom display pieces for English-speaking and international collectors. This version is now powered by a structured artwork database and an organized image asset library.

View the first collectionManage artworks

Asset Library v1

Featured Works

Artwork data is loaded through the site data layer. Images have been classified, renamed, optimized, and converted to WebP for fast Cloudflare Pages delivery.

View artwork JSON
Loading artworks...

Workflow

From raw photos to a reusable collection system.

The first photo batch has been grouped by sculpture, compressed into web-ready formats, and connected to structured metadata. Future photos and videos can be added without rebuilding the site from scratch.

01 / ClassifyGroup multiple shots of the same sculpture into one artwork record.
02 / OptimizeResize large camera photos and export WebP gallery and thumbnail files.
03 / PublishUse D1 for artwork records and R2 for future uploaded media, while static assets remain available as a safe fallback.

Data-driven architecture

ArcForge is now ready to grow as an international artwork catalog.

Instead of hard-coding every work into HTML, the site now uses a structured artwork model with English-first content, Chinese reference titles, gallery arrays, image alt text, categories, materials, and status fields.

  • Default language: English for international customers
  • Structured data: /data/artworks.json as local seed and fallback
  • Database-ready: D1 tables prepared for published artwork records
  • Media-ready: R2 upload API preserved for large photos and videos
  • Optimized images: WebP versions under /assets/images/artworks/
  • Future-ready: can expand to multilingual pages and admin publishing
